hero.title: React Three Lite
hero.description: A lightweight React component library built on Three.js for seamless 3D web experiences.
features.title: Everything you need for 3D
features.description: Build stunning 3D web applications with minimal code
features.automatic.title: Automatic Initialization
features.automatic.description: Automatically initializes a 3D scene when the component is mounted, setting up the renderer, camera, lights, axes helper, and controls.
features.model.title: Model Loading and Caching
features.model.description: Supports caching models using IndexedDB to reduce repeated load times. The first load stores model data in a local database.
features.interactivity.title: Enhanced Interactivity
features.interactivity.description: Creates popups that can contain custom React components, supporting positioning and smooth movement in 3D space.
features.animation.title: Animation Support
features.animation.description: Built-in animation system for playing and controlling 3D model animations with support for multiple animation clips.
features.effects.title: Custom Effects
features.effects.description: Easily add visual effects like bloom, depth of field, and post-processing to enhance your 3D scenes.
features.typescript.title: TypeScript Ready
features.typescript.description: Full TypeScript support with comprehensive type definitions for all components and utilities.
quickStart.title: Quick Start
quickStart.description: Get started with React Three Lite in minutes!
contributors.title: Contributors
